title: $input.all() returns incorrect value in code node
symptom: The code node using $input.all() sometimes returns the value from the next execution instead of the current run's value.
applies_when: Executing a loop that processes one item per run
not_this_if: No issue with other nodes or when using different expressions
root_cause: The issue arises from n8n's internal handling of the $input.all() function, which can incorrectly reference the next execution's data instead of the current run's data, leading to unexpected results.
fix_steps: Insert an IF node set to always true between the last node and the code node
Re-run the workflow to check if the issue persists
agent_instruction: Add an IF node before the code node to ensure correct data retrieval.
